report.summary: Audited and polished both new learn guides (Smart Contract Security, Onchain Identity) — added BackToTop navigation, Article structured data for rich snippets, FAQ schema fix, interactive hover states on TOC/FAQ/related cards, and mobile table scroll hints.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to Smart Contract Security Guide (564-line article needs scroll-to-top)
Added BackToTop component to Onchain Identity Guide (497-line article needs scroll-to-top)
Added interactive hover states on TOC links in Smart Contract Security Guide (toc-link class with color transition + underline)
Added hover lift effect on related article cards in Smart Contract Security Guide (translateY(-2px) on hover)
Added hover border highlight on FAQ cards in Smart Contract Security Guide (faq-card class with border-color transition)
Added mobile scroll hint for audit firms comparison table (audit-table-scroll class with '→ Scroll for more' pseudo-element on mobile)
Verified both pages have proper breadcrumb navigation, table of contents with anchor links, and reading time metadata

sections.title: SEO & Structured Data
items: Added Article schema (JSON-LD) to Smart Contract Security Guide — headline, description, author, publisher, dates, image
Added Article schema (JSON-LD) to Onchain Identity Guide — headline, description, author, publisher, dates, image
Verified Onchain Identity Guide already had FAQ schema at top level (no duplicate needed)
Verified Smart Contract Security Guide has FAQ schema wrapping the FAQ section
Both pages now have dual structured data: Article + FAQPage for maximum rich snippet eligibility

sections.title: Visuals Verified
items: OG image: og-smart-contract-security-guide.svg (1200x630) — verified brand-compliant with shield decoration, code snippets, vulnerability badges, stats bar, gradient accent
OG image: og-onchain-identity-guide.svg (1200x630) — verified brand-compliant with identity node network, fingerprint motif, feature pills (ENS/SBTs/EAS/PoP/DIDs), gradient accent
Both OG images follow design system: dark bg (#080d1c), degen0x logo, gradient accent bar, bottom bar with URL, proper typography

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation passed with no errors on either modified page
Both pages import BackToTop from @/components/BackToTop (existing component)
Both pages import StructuredData from @/components/StructuredData (existing component)
